en.llmResponsePharsingErrorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
en.llmSendMessageError: Message failed to send. Please try again.
en.llmTransferToAgentFallbackMessage: Sorry, something went wrong. Let me transfer you to the next available agent

closeChatTextFields.title: Are you sure you want to exit the chat?
closeChatTextFields.body: The window will be minimized and your session will be saved automatically. You may resume at any time within the next 2 hours. To end the session, please click End Chat from the menu dropdown

disclaimerTextFields.title: Welcome To ABB Chatbot
disclaimerTextFields.gdprConscent: By chatting, you agree this chat may be monitored, recorded, and used for personalization, analytics, and other business services per our Privacy Statement.
disclaimerTextFields.marketingConscent: I consent to receive offers and news on products, services and events from ABB in accordance with ABB's Privacy Policy
disclaimerTextFields.note: Note: I am powered by AI. Before using AI results, verify accuracy and completeness

startupChatMessages: Please state your issue so that we can direct you to the right department
